response.original_title: Everything That Fell From The Mourning Dove's Nest As She Built It
response.overview: Days after my grandfather's passing, a mourning dove built a nest in my yard. I collected and photographed each piece that fell from it. My grandfather was a sculptor, often working in found material. Through my documentation my mourning found meaning and took motion.
response.title: Everything That Fell From The Mourning Dove's Nest As She Built It
